title: Instrument d'approbation

pages.text:
WHEREAS for the purpose of

facilitating and promoting exchanges in the fields of education, the humanities, science and art between Malta and the

French Republic a Cultural Agreement between the two Countries was signed at

Paris on the Fourteenth day of february,

One thousand Nine hundred and Sixty-eight by Mr Frederick B. Amato-Gauci, Secretary,

Ministry of Commonwealth and Foreign

Affairs, for the Government of Malta, and

Mr Hervé Alphand, Ambassador of France,

Secretary General of the Ministry of

Foreign Affairs, for the Government of the french Republic;

I, GIORGIO BORG OLIVIER,

Minister

of Commonwealth and Foreign

Affairs, do hereby declare and confirm for the purpose of Article 15 of the aforesaid Agreement, that the constitu- tional prescriptions in force in Malta for the conclusion and entering into force of international Agreements have been complied with.

Signed and sealed at Valletta this 26 Th day of Apiel one thousand Nine hundred and Sixty-eight.

Come plie
